title: Green Recipe Book
description: This resource pack changes the color of the recipe book to green.
body:
![Green Recipe Book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c7457925d1b132d15961174806a919074a6fc82.png)
This resource pack changes the color of the recipe book to green.
